request: Run the real Validator-A smoke check directly after TASK-016 wrapper fixes.
tier_rationale: Exercises external Validator-A wrapper/model path and records smoke artifacts; no product runtime, auth, DB, or production configuration changes.

exclude: Authority document changes unless a new repeatable defect is found

success_criteria: Invoke scripts/run-validator-a.mjs against a TASK-017 Validator-A handoff that references the TASK-015 Generator smoke result.
Confirm whether the TASK-016 Windows shim fix reaches a real Codex Validator-A result.
If Validator-A returns PASS or FAIL, record the normalized Validator result and evidence.
If Validator-A cannot run, classify it as Resource Failure and preserve metadata/stderr without treating it as Validator FAIL.
Write a concise report and commit/push the smoke result.

positive: Do not append normal execution events to the already completed TASK-015 ledger.
Keep all model stdout/stderr as local artifacts and summarize only non-sensitive facts.
negative: Do not expose token or secret values.
Do not rewrite historical TASK-015 events.
Do not merge product code changes as part of this smoke test.
